summary: US-003 is fully implemented and validated. src/input/signals.ts exports readSignals() which reads language (navigator.language, fallback 'en'), timezone (Intl.DateTimeFormat, fallback 'UTC'), screen dimensions (screen.width/height with fallbacks), and devicePixelRatio (nullable). All values stay in memory only — no localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookies are touched. All 21 tests pass (10 for US-003, 11 for US-004) and the production build succeeds. PRD already has US-003 marked as passing.
